description_long: This is a freestanding desk with an integrated hutch, featuring a black rectangular tabletop supported by four straight legs. The upper hutch section is white and includes a large open shelf spanning the width, as well as two smaller cubby shelves on the right side. There is a circular cable management hole on the left side of the desktop, suggesting functionality for electronic devices. The structure appears to be made primarily of wood or engineered wood, with a smooth, matte finish. The design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, study rooms, or public workspaces.
description: A modern freestanding desk with a black tabletop and a white hutch featuring open shelves and a cable management hole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black tabletop, white hutch with open shelves, and cable management hole.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the hutch and the thickness of the tabletop.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel of the hutch and the open structure of the shelves.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the two smaller cubby shelves and the overall profile of the desk.
